Article.ArticleTitle: Imaging features of COVID-19: a pictorial review.

Abstract.AbstractText: This review summarises the typical radiological findings observed in patients.
Recognising the imaging patterns is essential for early diagnosis and management of the disease.

Article.ArticleTitle: Genome-wide analysis of host response to viral infection.

Abstract.AbstractText: Viral infections trigger complex transcriptional programs in host cells that determine the outcome of infection.
